title: FLIP Fabrique: Six °
full_description: Five individuals who do not know each other receive a mysterious invitation that leads them to an old abandoned building deep in the forest. These visitors discover that this house has a soul. The show shares the concept that everyone on Earth can be connected to anyone else through a chain of no more than six degrees of separation. Almost entirely non-verbal, 65 minutes of acrobatic theatre shimmering with elegance, humour and sheer physical power.
ai_summary: Montreal acrobatic company FLIP Fabrique bring five strangers to a haunted forest building for a non-verbal 65-minute spectacle exploring the six degrees of separation theory — with a standout Cyr wheel sequence and a show-stealing trampoline act.
